title: Integra Magbead DNA and RNA Extraction for Isolated Colonies
author: Sophana Chea

steps.title: Add 20 mL isopropanol to the...
steps.instruction: Add 20 mL isopropanol to the MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 concentrate.

steps.title: Add 30 mL isopropanol to the...
steps.instruction: Add 30 mL isopropanol to the MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 concentrate.

steps.title: Reconstitute lyophilized Proteinase K at 20...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute lyophilized Proteinase K at 20 mg/mL with Proteinase K Storage Buffer and mix by vortexing. Use immediately or store at -20 °C .

steps.title: Reconstitute each vial of lyophilized DNase I with 2
steps.instruction: Reconstitute each vial of lyophilized DNase I with 2.25 mL DNase/RNase-Free water in a conical tube. For each sample to be treated, prepare DNase I Reaction Mix (scale up proportionally): Add 45 µL DNase I (reconstituted) and 5 µL DNA Digestion Buffer in a nuclease-free tube. mix by gentle inversion and place On ice until ready to use.

steps.title: Pre-make Lysis Buffer plate with 520...
steps.instruction: Pre-make Lysis Buffer plate with 520 µL DNA/RNA Lysis buffer in 1ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make Beads plate with 35 µL...
steps.instruction: Pre-make Beads plate with 35 µL ZymoBIOMIC MagBinding Beads into 96 V-well PCR plate. For the Beads plate, make it immediately before starting, <1h prior to starting the protocol, to ensure the beads are kept in suspension.

steps.title: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 1 plate with...
steps.instruction: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 1 plate with 520 µL MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 into 1ml deep well plate. Make it two plates.

steps.title: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 2 plate with...
steps.instruction: Pre-make DNA/RNA Wash 2 plate with 520 µL MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 into 1ml deep well plate. Make it two plates.

steps.title: Pre-make 100% Ethanol plate with 1100...
steps.instruction: Pre-make 100% Ethanol plate with 1100 µL of 100% Ethanol into a 2ml deep well plate. Make it three plates.

steps.title: Pre-make Prep Buffer plate with 520...
steps.instruction: Pre-make Prep Buffer plate with 520 µL DNA/RNA Prep Buffer into a 1ml deep well plate.

steps.title: Pre-make water plate with 60 µL...
steps.instruction: Pre-make water plate with 60 µL Nuclease-free water in a 96 V-well PCR plate. Make it two plates.

steps.title: Spin all plates down for 00:01:00...
steps.instruction: Spin all plates down for 00:01:00 except for the bead plate. Perform a quick pulse spin down of the bead plate, just enough to get all the liquid down. Centrifuge the rest of the plate at 12 000 rpm for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Create a plate map so you...
steps.instruction: Create a plate map so you know which sample you are adding to each well. Add 50 µL of isolated colonies samples to plate 1 (leave column 12 for water control).

steps.title: Top up the 1x DNA/RNA Shield to get 750 µL
steps.instruction: Top up the 1x DNA/RNA Shield to get 750 µL .

steps.title: Manually add 120 µL of Proteinase K into the 0
steps.instruction: Manually add 120 µL of Proteinase K into the 0.2ml 8-strip well.

steps.title: Use multichannel pipet to add 10...
steps.instruction: Use multichannel pipet to add 10 µL of Proteinase K into each sample and mix (plate 1).

steps.title: Load a set of Integra tips (tip set
steps.instruction: Load a set of Integra tips (tip set

steps.title: onto the Integra
steps.instruction: onto the Integra.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 15 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to pipet 250...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to pipet 250 µL of your samples up and down for 00:01:00 (15 cycles), then incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00 . Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul. Add 500 µL total of Lysis Buffer to the sample plate (plate 1).

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix samples and buffer for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix samples and buffer for 00:02:00 . Keep tips.

steps.title: Aliquot 35 µL of MagBinding Beads...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 35 µL of MagBinding Beads into 96 V-well PCR plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 20ul, 10 cycles, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the MagBinding Beads plate, so the beads are fully resuspended.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 30ul. Add 30 µL of MagBinding Beads into the sample plate (plate 1).

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the sample and MagBinding Beads plate, so the beads are fully resuspended. Continue this Integra Program to mix the sample and MagBinding Beads for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate/tube to the magnetic stand for 00:05:00 until beads (DNA) have pelleted, transfer the cleared supernatant (RNA) into a new 96 V-well plate.

steps.title: Change new Integra tips
steps.instruction: Change new Integra tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 into sample plate and mix well.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the Wash 1 buffer with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 into sample plate and mix well.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the Wash 2 buffer with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Change new Integra tips
steps.instruction: Change new Integra tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL 100% Ethanol into sample plate and mix well.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix 100% Ethanol with the beads
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix 100% Ethanol with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Dry the beads for 00:10:00 on the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Dry the beads for 00:10:00 on the magnetic stand.

steps.title: Change new Integra tips
steps.instruction: Change new Integra tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 30ul, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 30 µL nuclease-free water into the sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 20ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix nuclease-free water with the beads
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix nuclease-free water with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 30ul, speed

steps.title: Transfer the plate to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate to the magnetic stand and pellet the beads for 00:05:00 , then aspirate and dispense the eluted DNA to a new 96 V-well plate.

steps.title: Store DNA sample immediately at -80 °C
steps.instruction: Store DNA sample immediately at -80 °C .

steps.title: Change the new Integra tip
steps.instruction: Change the new Integra tip.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 230ul, 3 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 690 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 690 µL 100% Ethanol to the supernatant.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix 100% Ethanol with the supernatant
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix 100% Ethanol with the supernatant. Keep tips.

steps.title: Aliquot 35 µL of MagBinding Beads...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 35 µL of MagBinding Beads into 96 V-well PCR plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 20ul, 10 cycles, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the MagBinding Beads plate, so the beads are fully resuspended.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 30ul. Add 30 µL of MagBinding beads into the sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 10 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the sample and MagBinding beads plate, so the beads are fully resuspended. Continue this Integra Program to mix the sample and MagBinding Beads for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the plate to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate to the magnetic stand for 00:05:00 until beads have pelleted, then discard the cleared supernatant.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 1 into sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the Wash 1 buffer with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL MagBead DNA/RNA Wash 2 into sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the Wash 2 buffer with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL 100% Ethanol into the sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix 100% Ethanol with the beads
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix 100% Ethanol with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: DNase I treatment, use multiple channel...
steps.instruction: DNase I treatment, use multiple channel pipet to transfer 50 µL of DNase I Reaction Mix and mix gently for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 500 µL DNA/RNA Prep Buffer into sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 250ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix the...
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix the DNA/RNA Prep Buffer with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath...
steps.instruction: Place the 96-well magnetic stand underneath the sample plate for 00:02:00 until a bead ring forms.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 250ul, 2 times, speed

steps.title: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant...
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard the cleared supernatant into a 2ml deep well waste plate.

steps.title: Repeat step 57 to
steps.instruction: Repeat step 57 to

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet 30ul, speed

steps.title: Dispense a total of 30 µL...
steps.instruction: Dispense a total of 30 µL nuclease-free water into the sample plate.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Pipet/Mix 20ul, 30 cycles, speed

steps.title: Program the Integra to mix nuclease-free water with the beads
steps.instruction: Program the Integra to mix nuclease-free water with the beads. Keep tips.

steps.title: Program
steps.instruction: Program: Manual Pipet 30ul, speed

steps.title: Transfer the plate to the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Transfer the plate to the magnetic stand and pellet the beads for 00:05:00 , then aspirate and dispense the eluted RNA to a new 96 V-well plate.

steps.title: Store RNA sample immediately at -80 °C
steps.instruction: Store RNA sample immediately at -80 °C .
